channel.title: European Review of Contract Law
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in European Review of Contract Law

item.title: EU Digital Private Law: Tattering or New Beginning?
item.description: Article by Andrea Cioni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ercl-2024-2014

item.title: Big Data Misuse and European Contract Law
item.description: Article by Andrea Cioni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ercl-2024-2012

item.title: Lights and Shadows of the Tez Tour Decision: A Step Forward in Consumer/Traveller Protection Amid New Uncertainties
item.description: Article by Andrea Cioni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ercl-2024-2013
